content:
Narrative Essay - Prewriting
Introduction
Due by the end of the week.

This assignment marks the beginning of your journey toward completing a well-crafted narrative essay. However, this week, your focus will be solely on the prewriting stage, where you brainstorm ideas, outline your thoughts, and prepare the groundwork for your final polished narrative essay. Your task is to select a significant event from your life that holds valuable lessons.

Essentially, you will be telling a story with a moral at the end. As you delve into this narrative, reflecting on your emotions during the event is important. To captivate your readers, incorporate character dialogues that bring the story to life and allow them to immerse themselves in your experience. Furthermore, ensure that you provide ample descriptions to paint a vivid picture in the reader's mind. Remember that you will be required to share a draft of your narrative essay in a discussion with your peers during Week 3. This may impact the topic you choose for this assignment.

This week's first assignment will be to submit a prewrite for your Narrative Essay. The first step is understanding the makings of a meaningful and expressive narrative essay. Study.comLinks to an external site. gives a good overview of writing a narrative essay.
